scenarios.description: Brand-new user records their first pray activity. Expects: 10 base points x 1.0 multiplier = 10 points; level stays 1 (under 100 threshold); streak goes 0 to 1 with FIRST_EVER transition; first_prayer + level_1 badges fire.
User has already recorded pray today; recording it again is a no-op (same-day-repeat early return). Expects: zero point delta, no streak change, no new badges, SAME_DAY transition.
Brand-new user who already recorded pray and meditate today; recording journal as the 3rd activity. Tests multi-activity multiplier (3 acts -> 1.25x Growing).
User has done 6 activities today (mood, pray, listen, prayerWall, readingPlan, meditate); recording journal as the 7th completes Full Worship Day. Has active reading plan so 7-activity FWD applies.
Yesterday active (streak 1); recording today's first activity (mood) takes streak 1 -> 2. INCREMENT transition.
Yesterday active with streak 6; today's pray pushes streak to 7, fires streak_7 badge.
User was active 5 days ago with streak 5; today's pray RESETs streak to 1, longestStreak preserves at 5.
User did mood earlier today (lastActiveDate=today, streak=5). Recording pray is novel for today but streak path returns SAME_DAY. Tests that SAME_DAY transition still applies when activity is novel.
Streak 13 -> 14 fires streak_14 badge.
Streak 29 -> 30 fires streak_30 badge.
Streak 364 -> 365 fires streak_365 badge.
currentTotalPoints=90; pray adds 10 to reach 100 -> level 1 to 2, fires level_2.
currentTotalPoints=490; journal adds 25 to reach 515 -> level 2 to 3, fires level_3.
currentTotalPoints=1480; meditate adds 20 to reach 1500 -> level 3 to 4, fires level_4.
currentTotalPoints=3990; pray adds 10 to reach 4000 -> level 4 to 5, fires level_5.
currentTotalPoints=9985; journal adds 25 to reach 10010 -> level 5 to 6, fires level_6.
First activity of the day is mood (5 points * 1.0 multiplier = 5 points).
User has pray; recording mood as 2nd activity. 2 activities -> 1.25x Growing tier.
User has pray + mood + meditate; recording journal as 4th activity. 4 activities -> 1.5x Devoted tier.
User has 6 activities done; recording journal as 7th. 7 activities -> 2.0x Full Worship Day. Active reading plan present.
First-ever meditate activity; meditate count 0 -> 1, fires first_meditate.
User already has 99 prayers (pray count); recording 100th fires prayer_100.
First-ever journal activity; journal count 0 -> 1, fires first_journal.
User has 49 journals; recording 50th fires journal_50.
First-ever listen activity; listen count 0 -> 1, fires first_listen.
User has 6 consecutive gratitude entries ending yesterday; today's gratitude pushes to 7-day streak, fires gratitude_7_streak.
User has 29 unique gratitude dates; today's gratitude makes 30 total, fires gratitude_30_days.
User just completed their first reading plan today; readingPlanProgress has one entry with completedAt set. Fires first_plan.
User has finished 1 Bible book (John, all 21 chapters). bibleProgress.john contains all 21 chapter numbers. Fires bible_book_1.
User completes 7 activities for the first time, firing full_worship_day. Active reading plan present.
User completes 7 activities AGAIN; full_worship_day is repeatable so it fires even though already in alreadyEarnedBadgeIds.
User already meditated today; recording meditate again is a no-op (SAME_DAY early return).
User did pray today; recording journal as second-activity-of-the-day. journal is novel -> first_journal fires; streak transition is SAME_DAY because lastActiveDate == today.
lastFreeRepairDate=null; isFreeRepairAvailableAfter=true.
lastFreeRepairDate=2026-04-13 (last week); currentWeekStart=2026-04-20. lastFreeRepairDate < currentWeekStart -> eligible.
lastFreeRepairDate=2026-04-20 (== currentWeekStart). lastFreeRepairDate < currentWeekStart is FALSE (strict less-than) -> NOT eligible.
